response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks proven leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and has only basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content/workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal architecture design leadership
Lacks documented experience managing client projects or advising on compliance/security at executive level
